Follow-through after canary validates: (1) commit on branch off main, (2) docker compose build swe-agent to bake into image, (3) patch codex node after contract-upload finishes.

title: Plan Review: amend Codex empty-build TDD plan
description: Review of thoughts/searchable/shared/plans/2026-06-26-07-23-SWE-AF-tdd-codex-empty-build-fix.md found critical pre-implementation plan gaps. Review artifact: thoughts/searchable/shared/plans/2026-06-26-07-23-SWE-AF-tdd-codex-empty-build-fix-REVIEW.md. Required amendments: handle Codex shared structured-output file race in flagged QA/reviewer path; fix DB preflight inline-env false positives and align compose/runbook DB contract; propagate flagged-path FatalHarnessError; define module-level FixGeneratorResult and nested typed result models with defaults/BAML coverage; specify Codex subprocess timeout cleanup.
acceptance_criteria: Codex empty-build TDD plan is amended to cover the REVIEW criticals: invocation-scoped or serialized Codex structured output for flagged QA/reviewer; DB preflight handles inline DATABASE_URL_TEST and compose/runbook DB contract is consistent; flagged-path FatalHarnessError propagates; FixGeneratorResult and nested typed result models are module-level with defaults and BAML coverage; Codex subprocess timeout cleanup is specified. SWE-AF-e7e remains blocked until these amendments are in the plan.
close_reason: Plan amended from REVIEW: added invocation-scoped Codex structured-output behavior, timeout cleanup, flagged-path FatalHarnessError propagation, typed FixGenerator/nested schemas with BAML coverage, DB inline-env handling, consistent build-db compose/runbook contract, and fast runtime-provider mapping guard.

title: Fix Beads tracker health after embedded sync update
description:
## Steps to Reproduce
Run the standard Beads health commands in /home/maceo/Dev/SWE-AF after the sync.remote update. `bd doctor` reports unsupported embedded mode, `bd config validate` expects federation.remote despite working sync.remote, `bd preflight` emits Go/Nix checks that do not match this Python repo, and `bd lint` reports open issue template gaps.

## Impact
Agents can mistake unsupported or stale health output for repo failure, and open Beads issues fail the built-in lint checks.

## Acceptance Criteria
- `bd lint` reports no open issue template warnings.
- Working embedded-mode Beads diagnostics are documented for this repo.
- Dolt push/pull remains working.
- Any unsupported or misleading Beads commands are called out clearly.
close_reason: Fixed Beads embedded-mode health: added federation.remote compatibility config, cleaned open issue lint warnings, documented supported diagnostics, and verified Dolt push/pull.

title: PP Phase 0: classify locked/open + golden baseline + eval net

(0b) Capture golden PRD/Architecture/PlanningArtifacts/sprint outputs for 2-3 fixed goals under tests/fixtures/prompt_evals/baseline/. (0c) Build tests/prompt_evals/: schema validity, criteria->command coverage, exactly-one-vertical-slice, no target-project leakage, SYSTEM_PROMPT line-budget. RED proof: net must FAIL on known offenders (planning-loop leakage, sprint over-length). Plan: thoughts/searchable/shared/plans/2026-06-26-07-31-SWE-AF-tdd-planning-prompt-enhancement.md
acceptance_criteria: eval net runs in CI; detects the known leakage+budget offenders; classification recorded
notes:
Phase 0 COMPLETE (2026-06-26).
0a classify -> thoughts/searchable/shared/reviews/SWE-AF-ixn-0a-prompt-classification.md
0c eval net -> tests/prompt_evals/ (eval_checks.py + test_prompt_evals.py). Result: 14 passed, 3 xfailed(strict), 0 skipped.
  RED offenders detected: architecture_planning_loop (164 lines + 'Exploded View' domain leak), sprint_planner (244 lines). xfail flips green when Phase 3 fixes them.
0b goldens -> tests/fixtures/prompt_evals/baseline/ (goal_a_version_flag.json, goal_b_build_metrics.json + README).
  Captured live via swe-planner.plan, claude/sonnet all roles, repo /workspaces/dev/_prompt-eval-scratch.
  exec A=exec_20260626_161451_bd7iznuy (1165s, 1 issue) exec B=exec_20260626_161456_zzif2rv8 (1828s, 6 issues).
  Both: planning_artifacts non-null, exactly-1 vertical-slice, every issue has a runnable verification command.
Run: AGENTFIELD_SERVER=http://localhost:9999 NODE_ID=swe-planner uv run python -m pytest tests/prompt_evals/
NOTE: golden fixtures + harness are uncommitted (conservative profile, awaiting commit authority).
close_reason: Phase 0 gate complete: classification recorded, eval net detects the known leakage+budget offenders (xfail-strict), golden baselines captured for 2 goals; 14 passed/3 xfailed/0 skipped.

title: Factory: built-in test Postgres so DB-forcing deterministic checks pass for all builds
description: Build nodes have no reachable DB, so any issue whose deterministic check / verify gate HARD-requires a database (REQUIRE_TEST_DB=1, or a test that errors-on-connect instead of skipIf(!HAS_DB)) can never go green — it reds, downgrades to advisory, and relies on QA judgment. This silently blocked the Contract View foundation migration issue (cv-001). Fix durably in the SWE-AF factory: add a generic ephemeral 'build-db' Postgres service to docker-compose.yml + docker-compose.local.yml + the running /tmp/ddd-build/compose.yml, and wire DATABASE_URL_TEST on the build nodes. Each target repo's own global-setup migrates the blank DB (cosmic-HR's tests/integration/global-setup.js runMigrations), so it's repo-agnostic. Creds env-driven, cosmic-HR defaults. Document in BUILD_RUNBOOK.
acceptance_criteria:
- Build factory compose definitions provide an ephemeral Postgres service usable by all build nodes.
- DATABASE_URL_TEST is wired into Codex/Claude build-node environments without hardcoding secrets.
- A representative target repo can run its migration/global-setup chain against the build DB.
- BUILD_RUNBOOK documents the DB service, env defaults, and troubleshooting path.
notes: Implemented + applied. Added generic build-db (postgres:16) + DATABASE_URL_TEST wiring to docker-compose.yml, docker-compose.local.yml, and running /tmp/ddd-build/compose.yml. Verified: both nodes reach build-db:5432, real pg connect OK (cosmichr_buildtest/cosmichr_user), full cosmic-HR migrate chain applies (74 tables, through 067). Committed 42a5cc1 on branch factory/build-db-test-database (NOT yet merged to main / pushed). Documented BUILD_RUNBOOK §9.
close_reason: Built-in build-db test Postgres + DATABASE_URL_TEST wiring implemented across docker-compose.yml, docker-compose.local.yml, /tmp/ddd-build/compose.yml; applied to running factory (verified: nodes reach build-db, full migrate chain applies); BUILD_RUNBOOK §9 documented; merged to main + pushed (42a5cc1 on tha-hammer/SWE-AF). Future enhancement: per-build DBs for concurrent DB-builds.

title: Fix Codex empty build harness/runtime failures
description:
## Summary
Codex Contract View build failed empty: coder/reviewer/QA/fix paths collapsed to fallback/no-output behavior while Claude codepaths are completing tasks. Implement the TDD plan at thoughts/searchable/shared/plans/2026-06-26-07-23-SWE-AF-tdd-codex-empty-build-fix.md. Source debug research: thoughts/searchable/shared/research/2026-06-26-codex-coder-empty-cv-build-debug.md. Related active rerun context: SWE-AF-x04.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Run a Codex Contract View build comparable to exec_20260625_235508.
2. Observe cv-001 foundation migration enter retry/fix iterations.
3. Confirm the Codex coder path exits without persisted file changes (`files_changed=[]`) and downstream issues are skipped or downgraded.
4. Compare against the Claude rerun/control path, which completes normal build work rather than failing empty.
acceptance_criteria: Plan behaviors are implemented test-first; Codex strict schemas have no open additionalProperties; Codex CLI nonzero errors surface stdout JSONL details; reviewer fallback no longer raises UnboundLocalError; Codex QA synthesizer uses harness while Claude path remains unchanged; DB-backed deterministic checks fail early on missing DATABASE_URL_TEST; compose/runbook propagate optional DB config; targeted pytest suite passes.
notes: Plan review completed and amendments applied 2026-06-26. Review artifact: thoughts/searchable/shared/plans/2026-06-26-07-23-SWE-AF-tdd-codex-empty-build-fix-REVIEW.md. The TDD plan now incorporates all critical REVIEW findings; amendment issue SWE-AF-llt is closed.
close_reason: Implemented Codex empty-build harness/runtime TDD fixes and verified targeted suites.

CV owns 064/065 so renumber AOP 064->066. Re-fire on codex node swe-planner-codex with coder upgraded gpt-5.4-mini->gpt-5.4. Fresh clone of origin/cosmic-HR04 (cf1fbcf0c, has specs+skeleton+067). CV owns migrations 064(contracts)+065(contract_edges, procurement-owned). Follow specs/architecture/contract-view-MAP.md 9-step order.
notes:
Codex CV build (exec_20260625_235508) FAILED EMPTY again: 13 issues planned but cv-001 foundation migration failed_unrecoverable after 5 iters with files_changed=[] (Coder agent failed); 12 deps skipped, 0 merged, 29 criteria downgraded to debt. Root cause = codex coder persists no files + deterministic check needs a test DB the build container lacks. Debug report: thoughts/searchable/shared/research/2026-06-26-codex-coder-empty-cv-build-debug.md (for codex agent). RE-FIRED on CLAUDE node: exec_20260626_110823_845j14zh (Opus-plan/Sonnet-code).

close_reason: Contract View (Exploded Contract View) shipped via claude_code runtime (23/23 issues, 0 debt) after 2 codex builds produced no coder output. build-db fix unblocked the cv-001 migration gate. Verified: 483 backend + 71 UI tests pass, full migrate chain 060-067 DB-verified, migrations 064/065 (no renumber). Clean squash, no conflicts. Completed an incomplete lucide-react test mock (FileText). Merged PR #43 into cosmic-HR04.

title: Build watchdog turns green builds into 'failed' (no budget-aware finalize)
description: agentfield runtime watchdog (async_config.default_execution_timeout=7200s) cancels the build reasoner mid-phase and the control-plane marks the execution failed even when all issues are complete/merged and verification reports no blocking issues. Observed on exec_20260623_172701_y5ty895z (cosmic-HR Transcript Intake slice): 10/10 issues completed, 0 failed, verifier found no blocking issues, but WATCHDOG_FIRING at 7202.6s -> 'Reasoner build failed'. build() had no time budget and no CancelledError finalize, so a green build is reported failed.
acceptance_criteria: build() owns a wall-clock budget (BuildConfig.build_budget_seconds, auto-derived from the runtime watchdog minus buffer); when reached it stops launching verify/fix cycles and finalizes with completed work (completed_with_debt, not failed); CancelledError persists completed work; node runtime watchdog raised for headroom; unit tests cover budget computation, exhaustion, and finalize-green semantics.
close_reason: Fixed on fix/build-budget-finalize (pushed). build() now owns a wall-clock budget (BuildConfig.build_budget_seconds, auto = runtime watchdog - buffer); verify/fix loop won't start a cycle past budget -> records verification_incomplete debt -> finalizes completed_with_debt (never 'failed'); CancelledError backstop persists work; node watchdog raised to 21600s. 16 unit tests green (budget computation/exhaustion + deferred-verification->completed_with_debt). Live E2E (a real build hitting the budget) deferred — unit-validated.

title: Plan Review fixes: DDD modular planning loop (SWE-AF-cl2)
description: Resolve the 3 critical pre-implementation findings from the review of the DDD modular planning loop plan before coding begins. Report: thoughts/searchable/shared/plans/2026-06-23-07-38-SWE-AF-tdd-ddd-modular-planning-loop-REVIEW.md
acceptance_criteria: C1 target branch decided + line numbers re-anchored if BAML; C2 plan updates the 5 existing planner tests' side_effect/call_count (not just adds new); C3 validator-exhaustion degrades+warns instead of raising (or hard-fail justified+tested); W1-W6 folded into affected Behaviors (concrete validator fields, shared conftest fixture, field-name lock in round-trip test, PlanningEvent model, event-concept note, config threading).
close_reason: Plan revised to address all review findings. C1: merged feat/baml-structured-output into main (85a114e) so the plan sits on the canonical tree; all line numbers re-anchored (plan()@1570, insert@1680, sprint@1682, force-approve@1669-1678, schemas Architecture@62/PlannedIssue@122/PlanResult@141, pipeline run_sprint_planner@478). C2: Behavior 4 now updates the 7 existing planner tests' side_effect/call_count. C3: force-accept after exhausting retries (no raise), mirrors Tech Lead. W1: validator checks made field-concrete (migration_justification, gated_on=tested_slice). W2: shared complete_planning_artifacts conftest fixture. W3: round-trip test locks validator field names. W4: PlanningEvent vs internal_event_schema clarified. W5: PlanningEvent model added + injected clock. W6: new plan() params defaults-only, config threading out of scope. M1-M4 folded in.

title: Full-suite verification issue loops on pre-existing/out-of-scope test failures until exec time cap
description: The sprint planner injects a 'build-verification-integration-tests' issue that runs the ENTIRE repo test suite (npm test -> vitest over 436 test files). When the target repo has pre-existing failing/broken suites UNRELATED to the feature (e.g. cosmic-HR pipeline.stage6g.test.js, pipeline-partial-transcript.test.js — 0 commits from the build, broken on the base branch), the coding loop can never make them green, so it loops: full-suite run (slow) -> FAILs -> coder fix attempt -> rerun. In build exec_20260616_185315 this ran 'npm test' ~167x and consumed the full 6h exec cap (AGENTFIELD_ASYNC_DEFAULT_EXECUTION_TIMEOUT=21600) -> status=failed by timeout, no PR — even though all 155 SCOPED feature tests passed and every behavior (B2-B16 + frontend + stub) was implemented and committed. The verification issue should scope to the feature's own tests, not the whole polluted suite.
design: Sprint planner / verification issue generation (swe_af/prompts/sprint_planner.py + execution_agents verifier/integration_tester). Options: (1) derive verification commands from the plan's per-behavior Success Criteria; (2) run a baseline suite at workspace_setup, diff against post-impl to attribute only NEW failures; (3) cap verification iterations. Pairs with completed_with_debt/systemic-abort (27cb8a8) but is distinct: this is scope, not error-classification.
acceptance_criteria: A verification/integration issue runs only the feature-scoped success-criteria commands from the plan (e.g. npm test -- meetings/routes/recall), OR snapshots base-branch test results and ignores suites already failing on base; it must not loop the coder on tests the build did not author; build does not consume the time cap on pre-existing unrelated failures.
notes: Evidence: exec_20260616_185315 (node swe-baml-meetings). Time sink = 167 full-suite npm test runs on pre-existing-broken pipeline suites. Deliverable was actually green: 155 scoped meetings tests pass. Repo uses vitest (not jest). Branch pushed: Cosmic-HQ/cosmic-HR feature/2c1e6176-complete-meetings-tdd.
close_reason: Implemented via verification SCOPING (prompt approach). sprint_planner.py no longer emits 'full/existing suite passes' acceptance criteria; coder.py + qa.py scope to the feature's tests and treat pre-existing failures as out-of-scope. Applied on both main (fix/scope-build-verification) and feat/baml-structured-output (e746f26); swe-af-baml:smoke image REBUILT 2026-06-17 with the fix (verified in /app). Companion: cosmic-HR chore/gate-known-bad-tests gates the 50 pre-existing infra-dependent failures + adds the React-19 recruiter-ui test project so the target suite is green in build runs. Baseline-diff (approach B) left as a future option; scoping + target-side gating resolves the loop.

title: DAG build reports status=succeeded despite systemic provider outage dropping high-severity behaviors (false green)
description: When the coding loop cannot complete an issue and the recovery Issue Advisor also fails, the DAG records an 'accept_with_debt' adaptation and continues; the overall build then returns status=succeeded with completed_issues counted and failed_issues=0, even when the failures are a systemic provider/auth outage rather than genuine per-issue difficulty. In build exec_20260616_151835, a mid-run Max-plan OAuth expiry caused ~347 provider exit-1s; 6 high-severity behaviors (meetings-routes-api/B4, transcript-guard/B5, meeting-kind-sessions/B6, recall-bot-route/B7, webhook-meeting-provision/B10, backend-integration) were silently dropped as debt, no PR was opened (pr_url=''), yet the build reported 'succeeded'. accept_with_debt also masks the distinction between 'this issue is hard' and 'every provider call is failing'. Fix: detect systemic failure (e.g. provider error rate over a threshold, or repeated identical AuthError) and abort the build with status=failed; and/or treat N accumulated high-severity 'missing_functionality' debts (or zero PR) as a non-success terminal status.
design: DAG executor accept_with_debt path (swe_af/execution/dag_executor.py) + build() terminal status in swe_af/app.py. Add: (1) circuit-breaker on consecutive/identical provider errors (esp. AuthError from SWE-AF-vvk) -> abort; (2) severity-aware terminal status: high-sev debt or empty PR => completed_with_debt/failed, not succeeded.
acceptance_criteria: A build that drops >=1 high-severity behavior as debt AND/OR opens no PR does NOT return status=succeeded; a run where provider auth fails repeatedly aborts early with status=failed and a clear cause; build result distinguishes 'completed', 'completed_with_debt', and 'failed'.
notes: Depends on SWE-AF-vvk for clean AuthError classification. Evidence: exec_20260616_151835 result.dag_state: completed_issues=20, failed_issues=0, accumulated_debt=6 (all high), pr_url='' yet status=succeeded.
close_reason: Fixed in commit 27cb8a8 'fix build failure handling'. vvk: AuthError classification (authentication_error / 'please run /login') in swe_af/execution/fatal_error.py + swe_af/runtime/codex_harness_patch.py, non-retryable + surfaced. wtp: COMPLETED_WITH_DEBT terminal status (schemas.py, app.py _has_high_severity_debt) + systemic auth/billing abort in dag_executor.py. Verified: 60 tests pass (test_fatal_error, test_codex_harness_patch, test_build_terminal_status, test_dag_executor_fatal_abort).

title: ClaudeCodeProvider swallows subprocess stdout/stderr on exit-1 (401 reported as '(no stderr captured)')
description: The claude_code runtime drives the bundled claude binary (claude_agent_sdk/_bundled/claude). When that subprocess exits non-zero, the harness logs only 'ClaudeCodeProvider error: Command failed with exit code 1', 'Fatal error in message reader: Command failed with exit code 1', and 'Error output: Check stderr output for details / Stderr output: (no stderr captured)'. The actual cause is emitted by the binary on STDOUT (e.g. 'API Error: 401 {"type":"authentication_error","message":"Invalid authentication credentials"} · Please run /login'), which the harness discards. In build exec_20260616_151835 a Max-plan OAuth token expired mid-run; this surfaced as ~347 opaque exit-1 errors with no diagnosable reason, costing a full diagnosis pass. Fix: capture and surface the subprocess STDOUT (and stderr) on non-zero exit; detect auth errors (401/'Please run /login') and fail fast with a clear AuthError instead of generic retries.
design: Provider/transport in claude_agent_sdk message reader + swe_af/runtime/codex_harness_patch.py wrapping. Tee child stdout; on rc!=0 attach last output to the raised error. Add a regex classifier for 'API Error: 401' / 'Please run /login'.
acceptance_criteria: On provider subprocess exit!=0, the captured stdout+stderr (or first N KB) is logged at error level and included in the reasoner failure; a 401/authentication_error is classified distinctly (e.g. AuthExpiredError) and short-circuits retries with an actionable message.
notes: Evidence: build exec_20260616_151835 (node swe-baml-meetings, image swe-af-baml:smoke). Repro: run _bundled/claude -p 'Reply OK' --model haiku with an expired CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN -> prints 401 on stdout, exit 1.
close_reason: Fixed in commit 27cb8a8 'fix build failure handling'. vvk: AuthError classification (authentication_error / 'please run /login') in swe_af/execution/fatal_error.py + swe_af/runtime/codex_harness_patch.py, non-retryable + surfaced. wtp: COMPLETED_WITH_DEBT terminal status (schemas.py, app.py _has_high_severity_debt) + systemic auth/billing abort in dag_executor.py. Verified: 60 tests pass (test_fatal_error, test_codex_harness_patch, test_build_terminal_status, test_dag_executor_fatal_abort).

title: Implement BAML-typed deterministic backpressure rung (B0–B7)

Typed AcceptanceCheck + Pydantic validator + manifest detector + run_local_check + resolution + gated coding-loop rung; B0a bridge dict/Any hardening; B6b output_format render; B7 planner emits field. RGR per behavior; commit per vertical slice.
close_reason: All 10 behaviors (B0–B7, B6b) implemented TDD with full suite green (1109 passed). 3 deferred-verify items (live-LLM/real-build) tracked in follow-up.

title: Plan Review: BAML-Typed Deterministic Backpressure — 3 critical fixes before impl
description:
Pre-implementation review of thoughts/searchable/shared/plans/2026-06-11-07-43-tdd-baml-typed-deterministic-backpressure.md. Verified all file:line citations against /home/maceo/Dev/SWE-AF-baml @ 6517b17. Verdict: Needs Minor-to-Moderate Revision. Full report: ...-REVIEW.md.

CRITICAL (must fix before impl):
1) Behavior 4 runner contract mismatch: ci_gate.CommandRunner is argv-shaped (Sequence[str]), cannot run shell pipelines. Wrap as ['bash','-lc',cmd] (reuses argv type) or define distinct ShellRunner.
2) Behavior 4 timeout: ci_gate has NO per-subprocess timeout/-1 sentinel to 'mirror'. Must add subprocess.run(timeout=...) + TimeoutExpired->passed=False, else a hung command blocks the build forever (breaks the 'bounded' promise).
3) Behavior 6 control flow: run_coding_loop has no continue/break; a raw 'continue' bypasses checkpoint(730)+memory(737-745)+history. Gate the if-needs_deeper_qa branch and fall through; never continue.

WARNINGS: checkpoint persists summary not feedback (fold tail into summary); det_check_attempts must be added to checkpoint+resume loader; BAML @check has no fluent API (B0 spike covers it); PlannedIssue insertion anchors drift (use named anchors); config triplication propagation untested (add BuildConfig->ExecutionConfig flag test); manifest-fallback whole-suite pytest false-reds (exit 5 = no tests collected).
notes: RESOLVED 2026-06-11: all 3 critical + 6 warnings folded into the plan in place (plan grew 594->687 lines). B4: argv CommandRunner reused via [bash,-c,cmd] + own deterministic_check_timeout_seconds=600 + TimeoutExpired->exit_code=-1. B6: rung gates reviewer branch and falls through (no continue), folds tail into persisted summary, persists det_check_attempts across resume, +propagation test, extra=forbid semantics. Warnings: _tail re-export, BAML @check->tb.add_baml raw, named anchors for PlannedIssue/verification, pytest exit-5 false-red documented in B5. REVIEW status flipped to Ready for Implementation.
close_reason: Findings applied to plan; pre-impl review complete

title: Repository setup for Silmari branding pass
description:
Why this issue exists and what needs to be done

Prepare the existing SWE-AF repository for a Silmari branding documentation pass by verifying git state, creating an integration branch from the current HEAD, updating ignore rules for local worktree artifacts, and reporting repository metadata required by the build system.

Acceptance Criteria
- Existing repository state is preserved without reinitializing git
- Integration branch prefixed with build id f777d824 is created from current HEAD
- .worktrees/ exists and is ignored
- Remote origin URL and default branch are recorded
- Final result is returned as GitInitResult JSON

title: Spawn multi-repo Silmari rebrand/docs port build
description: Launch a Codex build-factory run to rebrand documentation and non-Silmari branding across the listed repos: /home/maceo/Dev/SWE-AF, /home/maceo/Dev/ragpack-af (user typed ragpak-af), /home/maceo/Dev/silmari-reels, and /home/maceo/Dev/agentfield. Scope: port all documentation, replace non-Silmari branding with Silmari where appropriate, require per-repo manifests/audits, report execution id and monitoring details. No Git push unless explicitly authorized.
notes:
Spawned four Codex build-factory runs for the multi-repo Silmari rebrand/docs port. Reason for four runs: the build pipeline operates on one repo_path per run, so each Git repo gets its own branch/commit path instead of loose cross-repo edits.

Runtime/target for all: swe-planner-codex.build with config.runtime=codex, planner roles gpt-5.5, coder/QA roles gpt-5.4, enable_github_pr=false.

SWE-AF: /workspaces/dev/SWE-AF — exec_20260629_180654_a1peawkj — run_20260629_180654_dvr5cmy4 — status running at first poll.
Ragpack: /workspaces/dev/ragpack-af — exec_20260629_180715_arw14yus — run_20260629_180715_h45j7pyv — status running at first poll. User typed ragpak-af; resolved local repo is ragpack-af.
Silmari Reels: /workspaces/dev/silmari-reels — exec_20260629_180734_0m4zoba5 — run_20260629_180734_3e2pn1lz — status running at first poll.
AgentField: /workspaces/dev/agentfield — exec_20260629_180752_ffy4aj3k — run_20260629_180752_31yxizd3 — status running at first poll. Local tree was ahead of origin and had untracked files; prompt told the run to treat local tree as authoritative and not discard user changes.

Each slice requires docs/silmari-rebrand-manifest.md, full first-party document audit, non-Silmari branding audit, link/reference validation, local integration branch commit, no PR/push.

Collapsing it = the codex-class no-artifact bug. Eval net 17 passed / 0 xfailed.

notes:
Phase 2 CODE done + committed (85d4eb1): tech_lead REJECT-first, 60->36 lines, lean role, five-check de-dup. eval net green, full regression sweep 40 passed/3 xfailed, existing pipeline test green.
BEHAVIORAL finding (2026-06-26): seeded-flaw fixture (tests/fixtures/prompt_evals/tech_lead/) too blatant — BASELINE node (APPROVE-first) already REJECTS it (exec_20260626_174501_ikasz30r, approved=false, caught AC2+AC3). So it's a NON-REGRESSION guard, NOT the anti-sycophancy RED->GREEN delta. Proving the delta needs a subtle borderline fixture run N times before/after (statistical) + the new prompt in a rebuilt node image. ISSUE STAYS OPEN pending that decision.
close_reason: Accepted on merits: tech_lead reframing is WISDOM-aligned, leaner (60->36 lines), de-duplicated, eval-net-green, and confirmed to still reject clear defects (non-regression). Anti-sycophancy is a deep model property not reliably removable by prompt framing; a statistical delta-eval is not worth the squeeze (user call). Behavior change shipped on its design merits.

title: codex builds: architecture planning loop runs model=sonnet under ai_provider=codex
description: After fixing the codex structured-output schema bug (typeless Any fields + sandbox default in codex_harness_patch.py), codex builds now pass PM/architect/tech_lead on gpt-5.5 but run_architecture_planning_loop fails fast (~8s): it runs with model=sonnet ai_provider=codex, and codex cannot run a Claude model. planning_loop_model is not in ROLE_TO_MODEL_FIELD so 'models' config cannot override it. Fix: route the planning loop to claude_code (CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN is present in the codex node) or to a codex model when ai_provider=codex. Surfaced by smoke build run_20260624_170203_vt4qj60k.
close_reason: Fixed in canonical SWE-AF: added planning_loop model role, passed resolved planning_loop_model into plan(), and verified live codex build ran run_architecture_planning_loop with gpt-5.5 under ai_provider=codex successfully before sprint planning.

title: Coder introduced prod-build breakages that passed tests but verification never caught (postcss try/catch + dynamic route w/o generateStaticParams)
description: In the meetings build (exec_20260616_185315, branch feature/2c1e6176-complete-meetings-tdd on Cosmic-HQ/cosmic-HR), the SWE-AF coder made two changes that pass vitest but break the production build (npm run build -> next build; Next 16 + Turbopack + output:export): (1) rewrote recruiter-ui/postcss.config.cjs to a try/catch require.resolve(@tailwindcss/postcss) pattern for the test environment, which makes Turbopack trace @tailwindcss/postcss + native deps (lightningcss, @tailwindcss/oxide) as module imports and fail bundling platform .node binaries; (2) added the dynamic route /meetings/[meetingId] without generateStaticParams, which output:export rejects. Both only surface in 'next build', not in unit tests. The build verification (build-verification-integration-tests) ran the full vitest suite ~167x and 'npm run build' ~12x yet still produced a green branch with a broken prod build, so it did not gate on build exit status (failures swallowed). Net: a branch that passed cannot build. Fixed manually (commits 24aa6d4, ba53c2c).
design: Relates to SWE-AF-4of (verification scope). The verification issue should run the project real build command and treat non-zero exit as a hard failure (not absorbed into accept_with_debt). Add a post-impl gate that runs the repo build script (npm run build) and blocks PR on failure.
acceptance_criteria: Build verification gates on the prod build (npm run build) exit status and fails the issue/build when non-zero; coder guidance discourages editing build/postcss config for test-only reasons (use a test config instead); a dynamic route added under output:export must include generateStaticParams. A comparable re-run does not produce a branch whose prod build fails.
notes: MERGED 2026-06-18: committed e3e867c on fix/scope-build-verification, then merged fix/scope-build-verification -> feat/baml-structured-output (clean, no conflicts). BAML branch now has 27cb8a8 (build-failure-handling, vvk/wtp) + 4of + gnm gate. Tests green on BAML: 99 (gate+verifier+schema+coding-loop) + 21 (verify/fix-loop) + 392 fast suite. NOT yet pushed; directory consolidation pending user decision.
close_reason: Implemented + merged to feat/baml-structured-output (pushed 8ef44c0). Production-build hard gate: verifier runs real build, non-zero exit forces passed=false, _execution_status returns failed before debt downgrade, PR creation skipped. AC1/2/3 done + tested (99+21+392 green). AC4 (live re-run shows no broken-build branch) deferred to next BAML build, same as SWE-AF-4of.
